name: playwright-cli
description: Stateless Playwright CLI wrapper for browser install and one-shot automation tasks with deterministic JSON outputs.
capability_summary: Provides install, screenshot, pdf, and codegen command access through a JSON-stable wrapper suitable for non-session automation.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: Command to run: install, screenshot, pdf, or codegen.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: Target page URL for screenshot, pdf, and codegen commands.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Output artifact path for screenshot/pdf/codegen commands.

commands.name: screenshot
commands.description: Capture a screenshot from URL to output path.

commands.name: pdf
commands.description: Export URL page as PDF to output path.

commands.name: codegen
commands.description: Start Playwright code generator for URL and write script output for review.
